name: modharbor
description: ModHarbor — manage and launch your game mods
author: ModHarbor

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n app,web -c cyan,magenta "electron-vite dev" "npm run dev --prefix landing"
scripts.build:unpack: node scripts/verify-packaging.mjs && npm run build && electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.build:win: node scripts/verify-packaging.mjs && node scripts/sync-supabase-config.mjs && npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.build:win:publish: node scripts/verify-packaging.mjs && node scripts/sync-supabase-config.mjs && npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
scripts.build:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.build:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
